issue.title: Add a script to upload apks in a github release

comment.body:
Closing this in favor of the APKDistribution route chosen in 2026.

The selected direction is:
- keep APK distribution on GitHub Releases in the canonical repo
- use JitPack for public `abcvlib` consumption

The follow-up work is tracked in:
- #196 Make `abcvlib` buildable on JitPack without GitHub credentials
- #195 Document APK releases on GitHub and public `abcvlib` consumption via JitPack

The implementation PR for that route is #199.
